case_title: SAN FRANCISCO FEDERAL CREDIT UNION VS. ZAAKEL S JACKSON ET AL

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 74919870), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO FEDERAL CREDIT UNION SERVED OCT-25-2024, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, MAILING DATE OCT-28-2024 AS TO DEFENDANT JACKSON, ZAAKEL S AKA ZAAKEL JACKSON JR

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 74735118) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO FEDERAL CREDIT UNION AS TO DEFENDANT JACKSON, ZAAKEL S AKA ZAAKEL JACKSON JR DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-08-2025
CIVIL CASE COVERSHEET FILED (TRANSACTION ID # 74735118) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO FEDERAL CREDIT UNION
DECLARATION RE: VENUE (TRANSACTION ID # 74735118) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO FEDERAL CREDIT UNION
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 75032967) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO FEDERAL CREDIT UNION ALSO FILED BY DEFENDANT JACKSON, ZAAKEL S AKA ZAAKEL JACKSON JR
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 75032967) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, (TRANSACTION ID # 76956449) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO FEDERAL CREDIT UNION AS TO DEFENDANT JACKSON, ZAAKEL S AKA ZAAKEL JACKSON JR
SUMMONS ISSUED (TRANSACTION ID # 74735118) TO PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO FEDERAL CREDIT UNION

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: PLAINTIFF SHALL HAVE JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFENDANT(S) HEREIN IN THE SUM OF $3,055.93. FURTHER EXECUTION ON THE JUDGMENT SHALL BE STAYED PROVIDED THE DEFENDANT, ZAAKEL S JACKSON AKA ZAAKEL JACKSON JR, SHALL PAY TO PLAINTIFF TEN PAYMENTS OF $305.59 ON THE 25TH OF EACH MONTH BEGINNING NOVEMBER 25,2024, UNTIL PAID IN FULL. SHOULD THE DEFENDANT(S) DEFAULT IN MAKING THE PAYMENT WHEN DUE, PLAINTIFF SHALL THEREAFTER BE ENTITLED TO EXECUTE ON THE REMAINING JUDGMENT BALANCE DUE, LESS CREDITS FOR PAYMENTS RECEIVED WITHOUT FURTHER ORDER FROM THE COURT. **SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT**
